_comment: Fictional sample payload — no real data. Low-risk internal API request expected to be auto-allowed.
mcp_tool_scope: None — standard REST API, no MCP protocol
agentic_scope: Human-directed only — user explicitly prompts AI assistant to fetch a document; no autonomous tool execution
business_purpose: Allow AI assistant to surface relevant internal engineering documentation when developers ask questions. Reduces time spent searching the documentation portal. Strictly read-only; no write capability requested.
requested_permissions: Read-only access to /docs API endpoint — GET requests only
review_period: 30 days, then re-review before promotion to staging
credential_storage: n8n credential store with read-only API key
